name: Roundtable
description: A per-placement private discussion + two prioritized idea boards for known space members. Members chat in a single channel, add items to a Positives list (features/tasks) or a Negatives list (issues/bugs), and +1 the ones that matter. Items are ranked by votes, then recency. Only the owner can rename the frame and set high-level preferences. Anonymous viewers see a private-frame notice.
